title: Rapid turn-taking after an interruption

transcript.agent: Okay so for the warranty you get twelve months of coverage starting from the...
transcript.agent_resume: yes, twelve months, and you can extend it later

why_it_matters: A short interruption followed by a quick answer and hand-back. The scored onset is the interruption at 2.10 seconds. This fixture exercises the common failure where an agent yields correctly but then either does not come back, or steps on the caller again when it resumes. The primary signals here are measured on the first onset; use the agent_resume segment to eyeball whether your resume behavior is clean.
